briefdescription.para: The static initializer for dlnode.
The static initializer for dllist.
Iterates in order over each node in a doubly-linked list.

detaileddescription.para: It is safe to remove the current node during the iteration.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the first node in the list.
the name of the pointer to the nodes. This variable is declared in the scope of the loop.

briefdescription.para: Iterates in order over each node in a doubly-linked list.

detaileddescription.para: It is safe to remove the current node during the iteration.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a doubly-linked list.
the name of the pointer to the nodes. This variable is declared in the scope of the loop.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a node in a doubly-linked list.
Inserts node after prev.

simplesect.para: true if prev was the last node in the list and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Inserts node before next.

simplesect.para: true if next was the first node in the list and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Removes node from a doubly-list.

detaileddescription.para: Note that this function does not reset the prev and next fields of the node.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a doubly-linked list.
Returns true if the doubly-linked list is empty, and false if not.
Returns the size (in number of nodes) of a doubly-linked list.
Pushes a node to the front of a doubly-linked list.
Pushes a node to the back of a doubly-linked list.
Pops a node from the front of a doubly-linked list.
Pops a node from the back of a doubly-linked list.
Inserts a node into a doubly-linked list.

detaileddescription.para: prev MUST be part of list. This is an O(1) operation.

briefdescription.para: Inserts a node into a doubly-linked list.

detaileddescription.para: next MUST be part of list. This is an O(1) operation.

briefdescription.para: Removes a node from a doubly-linked list.

detaileddescription.para: node MUST be part of list. This is an O(1) operation.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a node is part of a doubly-linked list.

simplesect.para: true if the node was found in the list, and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Appends the doubly-linked list at src to the one at dst.

detaileddescription.para: After the operation, the list at src is empty.

briefdescription.para: Returns a pointer to the first node in a doubly-linked list.
Returns a pointer to the last node in a doubly-linked list.
This header file is part of the utilities library; it contains the doubly-linked list declarations.

detaileddescription.para:
